CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
